26a9566f-4a9d-431c-af99-f0b238819812:
Professional Services: AI Infrastructure & Backend Engineering
1. Core Competencies
• AI Agentic Workflows: Architecture of autonomous agents utilizing LangChain/Llama
frameworks.
• Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Docker-containerized deployments for environment
parity and portability.
• Database & RAG: Vector database configuration (Pinecone/PostgreSQL/pgvector) for
accurate LLM context retrieval.
• Backend Integration: Python-driven middleware for API authentication, rate-limiting,
and error handling.
2. Engineering Philosophy I prioritize scalability and maintainability. My deliverables consist
of modular, well-commented source code designed for future expansion, avoiding
proprietary "no-code" lock-in where custom logic is required for performance.
3. Engagement Model
1. Requirements Analysis: Definition of technical specifications and constraints.
2. System Architecture Design: Creation of data flow models and API specifications.
3. Implementation & Testing: Iterative deployment with rigorous unit validation.
4. Handover: Delivery of source code, deployment instructions, and documentation.
2041846a-f751-4993-96b7-9868b7e33a37:
Technical Case Study: Production AI Workflow Integration
1. Executive Summary A client required an automated pipeline to process high-frequency
lead data from web-sources into a centralized CRM. The manual process was unsustainable,
causing data latency and loss.
2. System Architecture
• Primary Stack: Python, n8n (Self-hosted/Dockerized), PostgreSQL.
• Integrations: RESTful API abstraction between Webhook endpoints and CRM
interface.
• Resiliency: Implemented automated retry logic and environment variable
management for production-level stability.
3. Performance Metrics
• Throughput: ~500+ records/day processed with zero manual intervention.
• Data Integrity: 99.9% error-free ingestion via automated validation schemas.
• Operational Overhead: Reduced manual administrative hours from 10+ to 0.

96c41920-3919-4f70-9482-a5689c36db4a.text:
Professional Services: AI Infrastructure & Backend Engineering
1. Core Competencies
• AI Agentic Workflows: Architecture of autonomous agents utilizing LangChain/Llama
frameworks.
• Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Docker-containerized deployments for environment
parity and portability.
• Database & RAG: Vector database configuration (Pinecone/PostgreSQL/pgvector) for
accurate LLM context retrieval.
• Backend Integration: Python-driven middleware for API authentication, rate-limiting,
and error handling.
2. Engineering Philosophy I prioritize scalability and maintainability. My deliverables consist
of modular, well-commented source code designed for future expansion, avoiding
proprietary "no-code" lock-in where custom logic is required for performance.
3. Engagement Model
1. Requirements Analysis: Definition of technical specifications and constraints.
2. System Architecture Design: Creation of data flow models and API specifications.
3. Implementation & Testing: Iterative deployment with rigorous unit validation.
4. Handover: Delivery of source code, deployment instructions, and documentation.

• Database & RAG: Vector database configuration (Pinecone/PostgreSQL/pgvector) for
accurate LLM context retrieval.
• Backend Integration: Python-driven middleware for API authentication, rate-limiting,
and error handling.
2. Engineering Philosophy I prioritize scalability and maintainability. My deliverables consist
of modular, well-commented source code designed for future expansion, avoiding
proprietary "no-code" lock-in where custom logic is required for performance.
3. Engagement Model
1. Requirements Analysis: Definition of technical specifications and constraints.
2. System Architecture Design: Creation of data flow models and API specifications.
3. Implementation & Testing: Iterative deployment with rigorous unit validation.
4. Handover: Delivery of source code, deployment instructions, and documentation.
